summary: Form 16 forms the basis of income reporting in ITR. It is important to verify the details mentioned in it, including total income, tax deducted at source, exemptions, and deductions claimed during the financial year.&nbsp;

title: Can EPFO recover PF money after employer’s violation? Telangana HC delivers key ruling
summary: The Telangana High Court has ruled that EPFO cannot recover provident fund dues from an employee for an employer's alleged violation of EPF rules. The court said liability for transferring PF accumulations after surrender of the exemption rests with the employer and trust.

title: Money-market fund vs short-duration fund: Where to park your cash and why
summary: Money-market funds primarily invest in short-term instruments maturing within one year, while short-duration funds invest in a mix of debt securities and money-market instruments with a portfolio duration of 1 to 3 years.

title: NSE Indices launch 11 new sectoral indices including Nifty Power and Nifty Hospitals
